3253970.name: HARVEST MASTER
3253970.description:
A farm-based puzzle game that reads one move ahead.

・Description

Plant vegetable and fruit seeds in a 5 x 5 square field.

When seeds are planted, the already planted seeds grow and become seedlings, which can be harvested when they reach their maximum growth.

Then, when you harvest, you get points based on the type of harvest.

・Tips for achieving high scores

If the same type of vegetable or fruit is lined up horizontally, vertically, or diagonally, the score obtained when harvesting will be increased.

The magnification is different for three in a row and for five in a row, respectively.

If you want to aim for a consistently high score, aim for a 3 in a row. If you want to aim for an even higher score, aim for a 5 in a row.

Aim for a high score by thinking about where to plant which vegetable and fruit seeds, and which ones to harvest at what time!

・Terms of live streaming

unlimited
